title: Sagar Fiesta 2026
description: The ultimate tech-cultural extravaganza of SISTec. A celebration of innovation, talent, and creativity.
longDescription: Sagar Fiesta is the flagship event of SISTec, bringing together students from across the region to compete in technical, cultural, and sports events. From robo-wars to hackathons, and fashion shows to rock bands, there's something for everyone.

faq.a: All engineering and management students can participate.
Yes, online registration is required for all events.

title: Samadhaan Hackathon
description: 24-hour hackathon to solve real-world problems. Build, innovate, and win big!
longDescription: Samadhaan is a platform for young minds to tackle challenges in healthcare, agriculture, and urban development using technology. Join teams, brainstorm, and build prototypes within 24 hours.

faq.a: Yes, we encourage both software and hardware solutions.

title: Adhaar Quiz League
description: Test your knowledge across science, tech, and current affairs in this mega quiz.
longDescription: Adhaar Quiz League is designed to challenge your intellect and memory. Compete against the brightest minds and dive deep into the world of facts.

faq.a: No, entry is free for all SISTec students.
